s07_test_accounts: Mixpanel will not update automatically when accounts are deleted in Supabase.
s07_test_accounts: To update Mixpanel, either filter out test accounts in dashboards/cohorts or delete them via the Mixpanel API.
s07_test_accounts: Filtering in Mixpanel is safe as long as criteria only catch test accounts—mistakes just hide real users, not delete.
s07_test_accounts: Deleting Mixpanel user profiles via API is risky and permanent—it can’t be undone.
